leadership.name: Mr. Salim Khan
leadership.message: At Sajj Global School, we nurture not just academic excellence but the complete human being — a young person of curiosity, integrity, and compassion. Every child who walks through these gates carries the potential to shape a better world. Our commitment is simply this: to give them every possible tool to do so.
leadership.shortBio: A visionary leader and the driving force behind the Sajj Global Foundation, Mr. Salim Khan has championed quality education as a fundamental right for two decades.

leadership.name: Ms. Nadia Hussain
leadership.message: Education is the greatest equaliser. At Sajj Global School, we believe every child is gifted — our role is to discover that gift, cultivate it, and send them into the world with confidence, empathy, and a lifelong love for learning. I am proud of every student, every teacher, and every family that makes this community extraordinary.
leadership.shortBio: With over 22 years in education, Ms. Nadia Hussain has led SGS through its most significant period of growth, driving academic innovation and community engagement.
